text.title: Kibana Queries, Dashboards, and Alerting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on viewer choice + maintenance horizon.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: build-query-bank
step.action: Author KQL queries on keyword fields; sanity-check on 1h of data.

step.name: provision-alerts
step.action: Define Watcher or Kibana alerting rules incl. missing-heartbeat per critical service.

step.name: harden-kibana-yml
step.action: Set encryption keys, SSL, session TTL; restart Kibana.

step.name: scope-rbac-validate
step.action: Create per-team roles; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
